title: session_parts has stale copy-paste comment
description: methods.rs session_parts: the comment 'currently mirrors: build_client, auth_header' is a verbatim copy from the auth.rs blanket-impl maintenance note. It makes no sense in the context of session_parts (which extracts api_url and account_id from a Session). A contributor reading it will be confused about what 'mirrors' means here. Fix: remove the stale comment.
